channel.title: Comments for page "Cater Duty"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Cater Duty"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: well now i cant stomach pizza anymore.. still good. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I liked this a lot — I found the last segment (where Cousin Johnny is being consumed) extraordinarily creepy. I was relieved that Tyrone got away at the end. You've really characterised him very impressively.

Best of luck with the rest of the OCT tournament, from a fellow contestant! <3

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I like everything about this (especially Tyrone surviving and calling for help, and the dialogue afterwards) except for the gibberish. It's just kind of not as fun to read at length.

+1 in any case

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Honestly, the only thing that kept me from an upvote was Cousin Johnny wriggling his penis. He's got a dirty sense of humor, but he's not, like, a pervert.

Edit: I’m changing my vote to an upvote, because this is an OC contest, and characters can stand to be a little zanier.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I was genuinely glad to see Tyrone get away. That's a remarkable degree of sympathy to elicit for someone who is, after all, a D class. Well done.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Amazing. I soon as it was Cousin Johnny I upvoted. The imagery at the end was gross, and I'm not sure if I want to order a pizza anymore for tonight. Good job!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
So this is my entry for OCT. I didn't really want to post before Kinch, but one of us has to and since it looks like most people aren't going to post until near the deadline I didn't want my entry to get lost in the shuffle.

Even though this is far from the best article I've ever posted, given the constraints of the contest I think it turned out decent enough. With any luck, this will be the first of several crack pairings you'll see Tyrone in over the coming weeks.
